summary: Tested P2 (Custom Role Management UI for Admins) and P3 (Real Payment Methods in Sales Dashboard). P3 is fully working - Sales Dashboard shows real payment data from orders collection. P2 frontend is implemented correctly but backend needs permission updates for Admin role.

critical.issue: Admin role lacks 'access.view_roles' permission - returns 403 when Admin tries to fetch roles
critical.fix: Add 'access.view_roles' and 'access.create_roles' to admin default permissions in /app/backend/utils/permissions.py

minor.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests (minor - both reject correctly)

integration_issues.issue: Admin can open Create Role dialog but saving will fail with 403 due to missing backend permission

action_items: Add 'access.view_roles' and 'access.create_roles' to admin default permissions in /app/backend/utils/permissions.py (lines 228-249)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend permissions.py needs to grant Admin role access.view_roles and access.create_roles permissions to complete P2 implementation
Frontend Permissions.jsx correctly implements limited role management UI for admins with filtered permissions

success_rate.backend: 77% (10/13 tests passed - 3 failures related to admin role permissions)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (P3 Payment Methods working, P2 UI working but blocked by backend)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P3 (Real Payment Methods) is fully working - API returns real data from orders collection (MTN Mobile Money 40.4%, Card Payment 5.8%, Credit Card 1.1%, Not Specified 52.7%). P2 (Custom Role Management UI) frontend is complete - Admin sees Roles tab with 'Limited Role Management' banner, can click Create Role, sees filtered permissions. Backend needs to add access.view_roles and access.create_roles to admin default permissions.

P3_payment_methods_api.test: Payment methods endpoint returns real data from orders
P3_payment_methods_api.details: API returns: MTN Mobile Money 40.4%, Card Payment 5.8%, Credit Card 1.1%, Not Specified 52.7% - matches real order data

P3_sales_dashboard_ui.test: Sales Dashboard shows real payment method percentages
P3_sales_dashboard_ui.details: UI displays real data from API, not hardcoded values

P2_admin_sees_roles_tab.test: Admin can see Roles tab on Permissions page
P2_admin_sees_roles_tab.details: Admin sees Roles tab with 7 roles displayed

P2_limited_role_management_banner.details: Banner shows: 'You can create and edit custom roles. System roles cannot be modified.'

P2_admin_create_role_button.test: Admin can click Create Role button
P2_admin_create_role_button.details: Create New Role dialog opens with filtered permissions

P2_admin_cannot_edit_system_roles.test: Admin cannot edit System roles (Super Admin, Admin, Operator)
P2_admin_cannot_edit_system_roles.details: System roles show 'System' badge and no Edit/Delete buttons

P2_super_admin_sees_all_tabs.test: Super Admin sees all tabs (Roles, User Permissions, Matrix)
P2_super_admin_sees_all_tabs.details: Super Admin has full access to all 3 tabs

P2_backend_admin_permissions.test: Admin can create custom roles via API
P2_backend_admin_permissions.details: Backend returns 403 - Admin lacks access.view_roles and access.create_roles permissions

mocked_data_note: Daily Sales Trend data in Sales Dashboard still uses calculated mock values based on total sales
